relationship.description: Each store is linked to one address; an address can host many stores
Each customer is linked to one address; an address can host many customers
Each customer has one gender; a gender can be referenced by many customers
A store can have many consumption records
A customer can have many consumption records

metadata.improvements_made: Extracted GENDER into a lookup entity to enforce consistency and future extensibility; replaced the direct gender attribute in CUSTOMER with a foreign key gender_id. Retained shared ADDRESS entity to avoid duplication. Kept essential STORE, CUSTOMER, CONSUMPTION entities and their 1:N relationships as per domain description. Added explicit relationship definitions and clarified cardinalities. The model remains simple, efficient, and now supports standardized gender values.
